sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Updates a warranty claim with agent_decision, agent_recommendation, kb_article_cited, and adds an audit work note. Accepts claim number OR sys_id. agent_decision must be exact lowercase: approve, deny, or escalate.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"number","description":"Claim number (WC-format) OR sys_id of the claim","mandatory":true},{"name":"agent_decision","description":"Decision: approve, deny, or escalate (exact lowercase)","mandatory":true},{"name":"agent_recommendation","description":"Complete reasoning with KB citations (max 4000 chars)","mandatory":true},{"name":"kb_article_cited","description":"KB article title(s) referenced in the decision","mandatory":false},{"name":"api_call_timestamp","description":"Current timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)","mandatory":false}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Update Warranty Claim
